# Martin Svoboda

> Portfolio and story of Martin Svoboda — twenty years an Air Force fighter and
> acceptance test pilot, now building software the same way he flew jets: nothing
> ships until it's verified. svobodamartin.dev is a scrollytelling site where you
> scroll and a life flies past — school, military aviation (Z-142, L-39, L-159),
> Afghanistan, airshow display flying, self-healing from ulcerative colitis,
> Bitcoin, and an explosion of real apps built with AI. The single goal is one
> email contact.

The site is a static single-page app (React + TypeScript + Vite) with no backend
and no data collection. Contact is by email only. Content is bilingual English
(canonical) and Czech.

## Contact

- [Email Martin](mailto:svoboda.m@gmail.com): the one call to action of the whole site.

## Live site

- [svobodamartin.dev](https://svobodamartin.dev): the scrollytelling portfolio itself.

## Work — the Claude-Code month (five real apps in ~a month)

- [RL Lab + Data Lab](https://github.com/Martin8O/RL-Lab): train, watch and play against AI — 9 algorithms across 100+ environments, from CartPole to Atari, Doom and board games (Python, FastAPI, PyTorch, React). Runs locally.
- [Registrace](https://registrace.online): a bilingual event-registration platform for 25 Buddhist centres — server-side pricing, self-service sign-up, emailed confirmations, role-scoped admin (Next.js, React, Prisma, Supabase). [Source](https://github.com/Martin8O/Registrace).
- [Těnovice](https://www.one-tenovice.cz): a bilingual fundraising app for the Těnovice retreat centre — live pledge calculator, anonymous public pledges, account-based editing on a serverless AWS stack (CDK, Cognito, DynamoDB). Built as a collaboration. [Source](https://github.com/AnnaRozumova/Tenovice_fund_page).
- [ClearFeed](https://github.com/Martin8O/ClearFeed): a Chrome extension (MV3) that mutes the topics you'd rather not see — politics, gossip, spoilers, sports, crypto — across news sites and feeds. 16 languages, 100% local, zero tracking.
- [BrainQuest + dev-brain](https://github.com/Martin8O/BrainQuest): turns an Obsidian knowledge vault into a Duolingo-style learning game with spaced repetition (FSRS), a skill-tree and an AI tutor (Next.js, Capacitor).
- [This site](https://github.com/Martin8O/Website): the scrollytelling site itself — an empty folder to a live production deploy in 4 days, then a 3D version in 6 more (React, TypeScript, Vite, Canvas 2D, Lenis).

## Work — before Claude

- [My Healing Journey](https://mojecestakezdravi.cz/): the site documenting how Martin healed himself from ulcerative colitis — his first web build (2015).
- [RR Centrum Polabí](https://rrcentrumpolabi.cz): a site for a regeneration & rehabilitation centre run by two physiotherapists (2022).
- [Discover Bitcoin](https://medium.com/@shadovv_50954/discover-bitcoin-the-r-evolution-in-the-world-of-money-9de1272b9b13): a detailed introduction to Bitcoin — the (r)evolution in the world of money.
- [Due-Deck](https://duedeck.lovable.app): a warranties, insurance-renewal, contract and appointment tracker that runs fully in your browser. [Source](https://github.com/Martin8O/Due-Deck).
- [Wealth-Deck](https://wealthdeck.lovable.app): a suite of personal-finance calculators (mortgage, savings, pension, investment growth and yield) with instant charts. [Source](https://github.com/Martin8O/Wealth-Deck).
- [Rand-Pulse](https://randpulse.lovable.app): a sleek random generator for quick decisions and inspiration. [Source](https://github.com/Martin8O/Rand-Pulse).
- [STRC Risk Monitor](https://strc-check.lovable.app): an experimental risk dashboard for Strategy's STRC variable-rate preferred. [Source](https://github.com/Martin8O/strc-check).
